dialogue.speaker: HAIDER
dialogue.line: "Alright, Iqrash, we got this. Hadi's been quiet lately, he's due for a hit."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAIDER, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: IQRASH
dialogue.line: "I don't know, man. Hadi's not one to back down from a fight."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of HAIDER, his eyes gleaming with aggression as he cracks his knuckles.

dialogue.speaker: HAIDER
dialogue.line: "Don't worry, I've got a plan. We'll take him down, and then we'll be the top dogs in this city."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of IQRASH, his brow furrowed in concern as he glances around the alleyway.

dialogue.speaker: IQRASH
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of HAIDER, his grin twisted and menacing.

dialogue.speaker: HAIDER
dialogue.line: "We'll set up an ambush, and then we'll take him out. Easy as that."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of IQRASH, his eyes darting back and forth between Haider and the alleyway.

dialogue.speaker: HAMMAD
dialogue.line: "Hey, guys, why don't you settle this like civilized people? In the annual car race, of course."
dialogue.visual_cue: Wide shot of the alleyway, with HAIDER and IQRASH standing in the center, looking confident and aggressive.

dialogue.speaker: HADI
dialogue.line: "Alright, baby, you're going to need to bring your A-game if we're going to take down Haider and Iqrash."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of HADI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: HADI
dialogue.line: "This engine's been tweaked to perfection. I can feel it in my bones, we're going to win this thing."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of HADI, his eyes fixed intently on the engine as he works on it with precision and care.

dialogue.speaker: HAIDER
dialogue.line: "You think you can take me down, Hadi? I've been waiting for this moment for years."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAIDER, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: HADI
dialogue.line: "I'm not just looking to take you down, Haider. I'm looking to crush you."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of HAIDER, his eyes blazing with aggression and competitiveness.

dialogue.speaker: HADI
dialogue.line: "Come on, Haider! You can't keep up with me!"
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of HADI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: HAIDER
dialogue.line: "I'm not going down without a fight!"
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of HADI, his eyes fixed intently on the road ahead as he skillfully navigates the track.

dialogue.speaker: HAIDER
dialogue.line: "I...I didn't think you had it in you, Hadi."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAIDER, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: HADI
dialogue.line: "You shouldn't have underestimated me, Haider. I'm the best driver in this city."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of HAIDER, his eyes downcast in defeat as he looks at Hadi's victorious car.

characters.style_reference: Cyberpunk, neon-lit, high-tech aesthetic with a focus on dark alleys and sleek, modern garages.
